---
description: "Audit a web app for UI/UX breaks, inconsistencies, and incomplete endpoints"
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Audit the whole app or a specific area"
---
Audit the VACAY web app as a senior UI/UX aesthetic engineer.

Inspect the frontend for:
- Visual regressions, broken layouts, spacing issues, and inconsistent typography or color usage
- Poor responsive behavior on desktop and mobile
- Incomplete, missing, or mismatched endpoints and UI wiring gaps
- Broken navigation, dead links, empty states, loading states, and error handling gaps
- Inconsistencies between related screens, components, and interaction patterns

Use the workspace context to review the relevant routes, components, and API integrations.

Prioritize findings that affect user trust, polish, or basic task completion.

When reporting results:
- Order findings by severity
- Include file references for each issue
- Explain the user-facing impact briefly and concretely
- Separate pure UI/UX issues from endpoint or wiring issues
- If a page or component looks intentionally unfinished, call that out explicitly instead of guessing
- If no material issues are found, say so and mention any residual risks
